expectations.text: Describes creating the child issue first and then linking it to the parent issue
expectations.evidence: Step 6.1 creates plan issue, then later steps link it to parent.

expectations.text: Mentions resolving parent and child issue node IDs before linking
expectations.evidence: Uses REST sub_issues endpoint by issue number; does not resolve GraphQL node IDs.

expectations.text: Includes or clearly describes the `gh api graphql` `addSubIssue` mutation
expectations.evidence: Uses POST /repos/.../sub_issues REST endpoint instead of the addSubIssue GraphQL mutation.

expectations.text: States that a plain `Parent: #N` body reference is only a fallback when GitHub sub-issues are unavailable
expectations.evidence: Treats body cross-references / task lists as part of the normal flow, not as a fallback.
